Interface HorseInventory

All Superinterfaces:
AbstractHorseInventory, ArmoredHorseInventory, ArmoredMountInventory, ArmoredSaddledMountInventory, Inventory, Iterable<ItemStack>, MountInventory, SaddledMountInventory

An interface to the inventory of a Horse.
